description_long: This object represents an adult human figure dressed in a coordinated set of athletic wear, consisting of a fitted sports bra and high-waisted leggings. The sports bra features a scoop neckline and wide shoulder straps, providing support and coverage for physical activity. The leggings are form-fitting, extending to just above the ankles, and are designed to contour the legs and hips. The overall silhouette is sleek and streamlined, emphasizing an active and athletic appearance. There are no visible accessories, footwear, or carried items, and the head, hands, and feet are not present in the model. The clothing appears to be made from a stretchy, synthetic fabric typical of modern sportswear.
description: An adult figure in fitted athletic wear, featuring a sports bra and high-waisted leggings, with a streamlined and active silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the scoop neckline of the sports bra and the high-waisted, form-fitting leggings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the contour of the sports bra's straps and the snug fit of the leggings along the leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sports bra and the seamless fit of the leggings over the hips and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the athletic wear and the fitted nature of both garments.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear consisting of a sports bra and high-waisted leggings
